name: Company Beef Oriental
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Frozen Chinese Pea Pods, 1 Package
recipeInstructions:
Use 1 5-oz can of drained water chestnuts that have been sliced.
Drain the contents of the package of mandarin orange segments, reserving the syrup.
1. Cook and stir the meat, onion, and garlic in a large skillet until the meat is brown. Remove excess fat from the pan.
2. Mix together the soy sauce, cornstarch, and molasses. Stir this mixture into the meat mixture.
3. Add the bouillon, water, pea pods, drained water chestnuts, bamboo shoots, and reserved mandarin orange syrup to the skillet. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the mandarin orange segments. Cover and continue heating for about 2 minutes.
6. Serve over cooked rice with additional soy sauce as desired.
